calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-02-2005 Continued To Mar-07-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-07-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: R. Edwards/E.Estacio, CSR: Antony Vaughn.
Marina Franco, Esq. for Plaintiff: Philip T. Tam, present, was sworn and examined;
No appearance by defendant Annette Visor.
Exhibit 1---collection of exhibits ---------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff, San Francisco Housing Authority and against the Defendant: Annette Visor for the restitution and possession of permises located at 655 Pacific Ave. # 206. Lease hereby forfeited. Exhibit was withdrawn and returned to counsel admitting same.

Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-07-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-02-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: COMMISSIONER--SUE KAPLAN; CLERK-PARAM NATT. ROOM 218

ARNOLD WALTER EVJE ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF PRESENT FOR S.F. HOUSING--NO APPEARANCE BY DEFT.

THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE BY DEFT. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN. MATTER NOW PROCEEDS AS A COURT TRIAL.
